_comment: Query-count ceilings + load-test p95 ceilings. Ratchet: tighten on improvement, never loosen silently. Observed counts (2026-05-16): dashboard 8, ledgerSummary 1, aggregateMonth 2, taskBoard 9 — all constant w.r.t. row volume, no N+1. Ceilings carry a small margin for plan/driver variance.

load._comment: p95 latency ceilings in ms for the load suite (on-demand / nightly). Observed (2026-05-16, local, 10 conns x 15s): health 20, notifications 22, cascade-projects 20, cascade-suppliers 22 ms p95, zero non-2xx. Ceilings set ~7x observed to absorb machine/plan variance; tighten further after a multi-run baseline.
